params.name: Otis Elevator
params.description:
On July 5, 1853 AD, Otis demonstrated his elevator safety system at the Crystal Palace Convention in New York City.
Otis, an American inventor, developed the passenger lift. Unlike old-fashioned elevators, it includes a brake that stops the platform from falling even if the suspension rope breaks. This design solved a significant safety issue of elevators, making them widely used around the world. The Otis Elevator Company he founded remains a leading company in the industry.
